spec.description: Designed to visualize flow data coming in from Kentik's Ktranslate open source flow collector.

spec.expression: SELECT A.device_name AS "Exporter", A.__value__ AS "Total Bytes", B.device_name AS "SNMP Device" FROM A LEFT JOIN B ON A.device_name = B.if_Address ORDER BY A.__value__ DESC LIMIT 100

spec.title: Top Flow Peer Locations
spec.description: Private IP's will not show on map. Country information is based on MaxMind GeoIP database

spec.title: Top Flow Local Locations
spec.description: Private IP's will not show on map. Country information is based on MaxMind GeoIP database

spec.title: 02. Network Flow Summary
